heading: Certain contributions to Trump accounts
label: 139J Certain contributions to Trump accounts
notes: Effective DateSection applicable to taxable years beginning after , see , set out as a note under .Dec. 31, 2025section 70204(e) of Pub. L. 119–21section 128 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Gross income of an account beneficiary shall not include any qualified general contribution to a Trump account of the account beneficiary.

children.heading: Definitions
children.label: b Definitions
children.text: Any term used in this section which is used in section 530A shall have the meaning given such term under section 530A.
